title: Farage accused of 'Trump-style election denial' after Gorton byelection
summary: Green MP Hannah Spencer accuses Farage of insulting voters after he claimed Reform 'came first' among British-born voters despite losing by 4,000 votes.

title: Farage to unveil Labour defectors 'next week'
summary: Reform UK leader confirms 'a couple' of Labour MPs are set to defect to his party in a major blow to Keir Starmer.

title: Farage paid £27,000 to speak at pro-Trump US think tank
summary: Reform leader to collect nearly £28k from Club for Growth, a conservative anti-tax lobby group with close ties to President Trump.

title: Reform UK unveils plans to restrict postal voting
summary: Party announces electoral reform proposals including removing voting rights for Commonwealth citizens in national elections.

title: Suella Braverman defects to Reform UK
summary: Former Conservative Home Secretary joins Farage's party, saying 'I feel like I've come home' to cheering crowds.

title: Farage announces Reform UK frontbench team
summary: Reform leader unveils shadow cabinet as party positions itself as serious contender for government.
